nasb.text: and that He was buried, and that He was raised on the third day according to the Scriptures,

esv.text: that he was buried, that he was raised on the third day in accordance with the Scriptures,

cnv.text: 又埋葬了，又照著聖經所記的，第三天復活了；

ccb.text: 然后被埋葬了；又照圣经的记载在第三天复活了，

csbs.text: 而且被埋葬了， 又照着经上所记的，在第三天复活了，
